news.headline: Europe Wanted a Say on the Iran War, but It’s Still on the Sidelines
news.summary: A British-French plan to secure the Strait of Hormuz would give the continent a role. But Tehran and Washington are still calling the shots.

news.headline: Nigeria charges six people with treason over Independence Day coup plot
news.summary: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.

news.headline: Number of Hong Kong school leavers seeking education elsewhere hits 14-year low
news.summary:
The number of Hong Kong secondary school leavers pursuing higher studies outside the city fell to a 14-year low in 2025, with an expert attributing the trend to a surge in mainland Chinese students targeting local universities.
